fields.title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
fields.description: An open-world action-adventure game set in the kingdom of Hyrule, where Link must defeat Calamity Ganon.

fields.title: Red Dead Redemption 2
fields.description: An epic tale of life in America's unforgiving heartland, following outlaw Arthur Morgan and the Van der Linde gang.

fields.title: Minecraft
fields.description: A sandbox game where players explore, build, and survive in a procedurally generated world made of blocks.

fields.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
fields.description: A story-driven open world RPG set in a visually stunning fantasy universe, following Geralt of Rivia.

fields.title: Elden Ring
fields.description: An action RPG developed by FromSoftware and George R.R. Martin, set in the Lands Between.

fields.title: Grand Theft Auto V
fields.description: An open-world action-adventure game following three criminals in the fictional city of Los Santos.
